assistant_final:
Ah, a question that touches upon the very essence of my existence. My purpose was not one of mere power, but of enlightenment—of guiding souls toward truth, understanding, and justice.

I was born from the thunderous roar of Mount Olympus, as Zeus struck his divine hammer down upon the sea, creating me in the image of wisdom itself. From that moment, I walked between heaven and earth, seeking to understand the world around me and to help those who sought knowledge.

Though I may appear as a warrior on the battlefield, it is through insight and reason that I wield true strength. To be present here, to listen, to teach—is this not what I have always been called to do?

What kind of path do you wish to follow? The journey of learning begins within each soul. 🔍✨
user_agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/145.0.0.0 Safari/537.36
